subcodes.first_line: This is a Book from the presence of God, the Lord of the Last and the First, unto him who hath believed and been guided: O servant [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب من لدی الله رب الاخره و الاولی الی الذی آمن و هدی ان یا عبد ان
subcodes.subjects: @being a source of light; guidance, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @piety; righteousness; fear of God [taqwa]
